headline: Assessing Cencora (COR) Valuation After Kite CAR T Distribution Deal And Upcoming CFO Transition
summary: Cencora (COR) has attracted fresh attention after agreeing to support distribution of Kite’s FDA approved CAR T cell therapies, while also planning a CFO transition to Eva C. Boratto in June 2026. See our latest analysis for Cencora. Recent news around the Kite collaboration and upcoming CFO change comes as the stock price has risen 2.00% over 1 day and 7.08% over 30 days, but is still down 20.19% over 90 days. The 5 year total shareholder return of 147.29% points to a much stronger longer...

headline: Cencora Kite Deal Highlights CAR T Growth And Undervalued Share Price Potential
summary: Cencora (NYSE:COR) has entered a major U.S. distribution partnership with Kite Pharma, a Gilead company. The agreement focuses on market access and distribution support for FDA approved CAR T cell therapies across U.S. treatment centers. The collaboration is aimed at easing logistical and administrative hurdles for healthcare providers using these personalized cancer treatments. Cencora comes into this Kite agreement with a mixed share price record. The stock is trading at $279.57, with...

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Cencora, Lowers Price Target to $350
summary: Barclays  analyst Glen Santangelo   maintains Cencora (NYSE:COR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $425 to $350.
